sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79891" key="parwpi/a1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρωπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corner of the eye</tr_> next the temple, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
